mapper.select: SELECT r.*, t.name as type_name FROM t_room r LEFT JOIN t_room_type t ON r.type_id = t.id ORDER BY r.floor, r.room_no
SELECT r.*, t.name as type_name FROM t_room r LEFT JOIN t_room_type t ON r.type_id = t.id WHERE r.floor = #{floor} ORDER BY r.room_no
SELECT r.*, t.name as type_name FROM t_room r LEFT JOIN t_room_type t ON r.type_id = t.id ORDER BY r.floor, r.room_no
